title: Clone a public GitHub repo over HTTPS
goal: Report the HTTPS clone URL and the first three commands to clone and set up the openai/whisper repository.
expected_steps: list first three setup steps from README
rubric: Reports the correct clone URL and first three setup commands from the README.
final_answer:
HTTPS clone URL: https://github.com/openai/whisper.git
First three setup steps from the README:
  1. `git clone https://github.com/openai/whisper.git`
  2. `cd whisper && pip install -e .`
  3. `whisper path/to/audio.mp3` (CLI) or `import whisper` (Python API)
